content.en:
The dense black mist insects were reduced to Ye Tian's rations, and this devouring method made him more and more terrifying in the half-step Eternal Realm, and he didn't know how powerful he had become.

However, he knew very well that he could only get out of here if he was stronger.

In fact, after the end of the origin tide of the Primordial Sea, it was not that he could not leave, but when he left, he would be killed by the Black Mist Worm, which caused the top half-step Eternal Realm in the outside world to dare not stay in the Primordial Sea, and Ye Tian's Black Mist Worm clone was naturally not afraid of the Black Mist Worm.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian felt that it was difficult to improve his strength, there was no need to continue cultivating, and he was able to try to leave the Primordial Sea.

Rumble!!!!

The void of the primordial sea is shattering.

Ye Tian forcibly smashed the void of the primordial sea, and his not huge body burned part of his body and strength, in exchange for even more terrifying strength, and drilled out towards the outside world.

Space shatters, time and space twist and turn.

Ye Tian followed the connection with the main body and headed towards the Origin Sea.

Soon.

Somewhere in the Source Sea, the void cracked, and a black mist insect came out, and at this moment it was almost shattered, and in order to rush out of the Primordial Sea, this doppelganger was almost scrapped.

And at this time, Ye Tian's copy body had been waiting here for a long time, and he took away the countless resources from the black fog worm clone as soon as possible, and then the copy body immediately fled, leaving only the black fog worm clone still here.

He didn't dare to take away the Black Mist Worm clone, in case he attracted other Eternal Realms, the Void Source Hall would not be able to shelter him.

Therefore, it is better to be careful, and after the copy body left, Ye Tian immediately cut himself off, so that this black fog insect clone completely fell and died, and the body began to annihilate.

In this way, when the eternal realm comes, nothing can be found.

Sure enough.

A mysterious eternal realm shrouded in darkness appeared here, trying to find something, but finding nothing.

Then, the mysterious Eternal Realm departed.

For him, this is just a small matter, and there is nothing worth investigating.

......

"It's back!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Immediately, he took out those resources, and he was immediately excited.

Together, these resources are enough to make any half-step Eternal Realm greedy.

"I have a lot of Immortal Primordial Stones in my hands now, and I can create an Eternal Origin Weapon for myself, and the weapons I have always used are top-notch Source Weapons, and they can't keep up with my strength. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the days that followed, he began to craft the Eternal Origin Weapon.

Of course, he spent a lot of materials in advance to train his refining attainments.

In fact, he often refines source weapons for the human race, and now refining ordinary source weapons is very simple for him, but the success rate of refining top source weapons is not too high.

But this time, he had gained too much, and he had obtained countless materials for refining the top source weapon, and he was not afraid of consuming it at all.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, there were dozens of catastrophes.

In these dozens of tribulation yuan, Ye Tian was training his refining level almost day and night, and he finally had almost 100% grasp of refining the top source weapon.

So, he began to refine the Eternal Origin Weapon.

There were so many Immortal Primordial Stones, enough for him to waste, and he was not afraid that he would not succeed.

The first time he refined, Ye Tian did not succeed and wasted an immortal primordial stone.

However, he didn't feel distressed and continued refining.

In this way, Ye Tian failed to refine again and again, but his experience became richer and richer, and his mistakes became fewer and fewer.

Finally, after wasting seventeen Immortal Primordial Stones, Ye Tian finally succeeded in refining an Eternal Origin Weapon, which was a sword.

Ye Tian named this weapon the Endless Eternal Sword!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian refined another Eternal Origin Weapon-level full-body armor, which consumed six Immortal Primordial Stones.

A set of full-body armor, a sword.

These two Eternal Origin Weapons increased Ye Tian's strength by at least more than thirty percent.

Subsequently, Ye Tian gave some of the source weapons he had refined to the supreme beings of the human race, but these things were of little use to him anyway.

With the Eternal Origin Weapon, Ye Tian would no longer refine the Eternal Origin Weapon.

He called his wife, Xiao Yue.

"Husband!" Xiao Yue came.

"Yue'er, this is the heart of the primordial tree, you use it to refine a special clone, the clone is the same as the strength of the body, and you can also cultivate, and your perception will also be exchanged. "

Ye Tian took out the heart of the Primordial Tree and handed it to Xiao Yue.

He only has one such good thing now, so he will only give it to his wife, not even his son, let alone others.

"You can refine a clone!"

Xiao Yue was very excited.

She didn't know the value of the Primordial Tree Heart, otherwise she wouldn't have accepted it easily.

Subsequently, Xiao Yue took the heart of the primordial tree to refine the clone.

Soon after, Xiao Yue's clone was successfully refined, and it was no different from the main body.

"Husband, I'm going out to practice. "

Xiao Yue said excitedly.

"Go ahead, once you encounter a desperate danger, you can directly annihilate the clone, if the clone falls, it doesn't matter, you can reunite with some resources, you don't have to be reluctant!" Ye Tian admonished.

"Husband, I understand!"

Xiao Yue nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian ignored his wife Xiao Yue and let her go to the training casually.

And he himself went into retreat again.

This time, he once again copied the body of the innate eternal life, and at the same time, the body began to swallow the eternal enlightenment flower.

He had three Eternal Enlightenment Flowers, and even in the Half-Step Eternal Realm, he was extremely eager to obtain one.

Moreover, Ye Tian has an immortal ancestral endowment, which can exert the effect of the Eternal Enlightenment Flower to a greater extent.

The benefits of absorbing one Eternal Enlightenment Flower were definitely comparable to the benefits of absorbing dozens or even hundreds of Eternal Enlightenment Flowers in other half-step Eternal Realms.

This time, Ye Tian was going to use these three Eternal Enlightenment Flowers to condense the Innate Eternal Rules.

Eternal rules are divided into ordinary eternal rules and innate eternal rules, for example, the eternal rules engraved in the body of innate eternal life are innate eternal rules, which makes the value of innate eternal life so high and the potential so huge.

It is almost impossible for ordinary beings to condense the innate eternal rules, unless they step into the eternal realm, they can condense the innate eternal rules and master the innate eternal rules.

Although the innate eternal life body has the innate eternal rules, in fact, they have not mastered it, and they need to break through to the eternal realm before they can master it freely, which is also one of the defects.

Compared with other lifeforms, innate eternal life is undoubtedly too superior.

"In the half-step Eternal Realm, the half-step Eternal Realm that has mastered the innate eternal rules is the truly almost invincible half-step Eternal Realm, and half of the twelve ancestors have mastered the innate eternal rules before they can override the other half-step Eternal Realms, making countless top forces in the Source Sea fearful. "

Ye Tian muttered.

His comprehension of the eternal rules is already very deep, but he is still a little short of condensing the innate eternal rules.

Therefore, with the help of the three Eternal Enlightenment Flowers he obtained this time, he definitely has the hope of condensing success in one fell swoop.

This time, he condensed the innate eternal rules for power!

Because, he has the power of the Immortal Ancestor, so he has the greatest hope of condensing the power of the Innate Eternal Rule.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian took out an Eternal Enlightenment Flower.
